# Mr. So Good

> Web design for small businesses. Nick redesigns and builds websites that are fast, affordable, and built to convert — no agency markup, no bloat.

## What We Do

Mr. So Good is a web design studio run by Nick. We specialize in redesigning websites for small businesses: bars, restaurants, salons, spas, and local service businesses. Every project starts with a free mockup delivered in 24 hours.

## Services

- Full website redesign and build
- Small business web design
- Free 24-hour mockup before any commitment
- Fast turnaround, fixed pricing, no agency markup

## Case Studies

- [Kensington Club](https://www.mistersogood.com/work/the-ken-club) — Dive bar and music venue in San Diego
- [River & Pearl](https://www.mistersogood.com/work/river-pearl) — Beauty and wellness salon in San Diego
- [Kensington Nails & Spa](https://www.mistersogood.com/work/kensington-nails-spa) — Nail salon in San Diego
- [Clems Taphouse](https://www.mistersogood.com/work/clems-taphouse) — Neighborhood bar in San Diego
